name: mahjong-miniapp
description: 可联网的微信麻将小程序 MVP — monorepo 根（npm workspaces 管理 shared 与 server）

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mahjong/shared && npm run build -w @mahjong/server
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @mahjong/shared && npm run build -w @mahjong/server && node --enable-source-maps server/dist/index.js
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mahjong/shared && npm run test -w @mahjong/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mahjong/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mahjong/server
